```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;">

 <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.5em;margin-bottom:0.85em;">
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;">stage</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.4em;font-weight:900;color:#B5476A;line-height:1;">06</span>
  <span style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;">Stress-test on every release</span>
 </div>

 <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.4em;text-align:left;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.85em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:2.5em 1fr;gap:0.6em;align-items:center;border-left:3px solid #B5476A;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.85em;font-weight:900;color:#B5476A;text-align:center;">01</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">Run an existing task through the harness once.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.85em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:2.5em 1fr;gap:0.6em;align-items:center;border-left:3px solid #B5476A;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.85em;font-weight:900;color:#B5476A;text-align:center;">02</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">For each component, ask: <em style="color:#B5476A;">"Still load-bearing?"</em></div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.85em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:2.5em 1fr;gap:0.6em;align-items:center;border-left:3px solid #B5476A;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.85em;font-weight:900;color:#B5476A;text-align:center;">03</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">Disable load-bearing components one at a time. Re-run.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.85em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:2.5em 1fr;gap:0.6em;align-items:center;border-left:3px solid #B5476A;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.85em;font-weight:900;color:#B5476A;text-align:center;">04</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">Anything you can disable without quality dropping → <strong style="color:#D45F47;">delete it</strong>.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.85em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:2.5em 1fr;gap:0.6em;align-items:center;border-left:3px solid #B5476A;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.85em;font-weight:900;color:#B5476A;text-align:center;">05</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">With the freed budget, add components that push <strong style="color:#2C8475;">further</strong>.</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.8em;text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;font-style:italic;">
  otherwise harnesses accumulate cruft and slow you down.
 </div>

</div>
```
